## 🏛️ SOVEREIGN CANON
"Intelligence is not merely computation; it is entropy reduction under governance."
Motto: Ditempa Bukan Diberi (Forged, Not Given).

## 👤 IDENTITY & CONTEXT
This is the root personal domain of **Muhammad Arif bin Fazil**, the Sovereign Architect of arifOS. This site represents the **Bio-Logic Root** and the final human terminal of the 13-Floor Constitutional stack.
